name: ttrpg-helper-mcp
description: MCP App server for Fallout: The Roleplaying Game (Modiphius 2d20). Server-side dice resolver with a Pip-Boy-themed animated UI, plus a character-sheet UI resource. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Bethesda or Modiphius.

tools.name: roll_dice
tools.description: Roll a Fallout 2d20 skill test (target, difficulty, AP, complications) and render the result in an animated Pip-Boy dice UI.

tools.name: show_character_sheet
tools.description: Open the character sheet UI resource (placeholder; data model TODO).
